site.title: Interactive Physics Book
site.tagline: An interactive physics lab — text, equations, and live simulations
hero.title: Infrastructure ready for interactive physics content
hero.body: This is the technical foundation of the book: a design system, full Arabic/RTL support, equation rendering with MathJax, and a framework for interactive simulations. Chapter 1 has not started yet.

ch1.sim.circular.title: Uniform Circular Motion Simulation
ch1.sim.circular.caption: An interactive replacement for Figures (1-1), (2-1) and (3-1) — change the radius, angular velocity, and mass, and watch the tangential velocity and centripetal acceleration vectors update live.
ch1.sim.kepler.title: Satellite Orbits & Kepler's Laws Simulation
ch1.sim.kepler.caption: An interactive replacement for Figures (4-1), (5-1) and (6-1) — change the eccentricity e and run the simulation to watch the swept sector cover equal areas in equal times (Kepler's second law).
ch1.sim.angmom.title: Conservation of Angular Momentum Simulation
ch1.sim.angmom.caption: Change the arm radius r to model a diver curling their body or a skater pulling in their arms — angular momentum L stays constant, so angular velocity ω rises as moment of inertia I falls.
